agentRuns.label: Agent 1
agentRuns.reportSummary: Core navigation is unreliable: the primary “Launch App” CTA didn’t open a visible app and several top-nav buttons (“Developers,” “Swap,” “Home”) often did nothing. Only some in-page links (“Route →”, “Monitor →”) reliably scrolled to content; “Swap →” failed. Network errors (aborted best-rate API requests, 400s) and serious accessibility contrast issues further erode trust. The site introduces the idea but doesn’t make the next step obvious or dependable.

agentRuns.label: Agent 2
agentRuns.reportSummary: Primary CTAs don’t work and in-page navigation is sluggish. “Launch App,” “Start Converting,” and “Developers” produced no visible change, while other links took ~4 seconds to respond or never left the marketing page. Console/network errors further undermine confidence. A serious color-contrast issue affects many elements.

agentRuns.label: Agent 3
agentRuns.reportSummary: The agent completed 0 of 1 tasks, partially completed 1, and failed 0.   The automated accessibility pass found 1 issue, including 1 higher-impact item. The final report was synthesized directly from recorded evidence because the model-based review step could not finish cleanly within the remaining run budget.

agentRuns.label: Agent 4
agentRuns.reportSummary: Navigation is flaky: several header buttons do nothing, and the primary “Launch App” CTA doesn’t open the app. Only a few in‑page controls (“Route →”, “Swap →”, “Compare providers”) produced visible changes; others (“Monitor →”, “Home”, “Developers”) failed to move the page. Console shows repeated 400s and aborted API calls, which undermines confidence. A serious color-contrast violation affects many elements.

agentRuns.label: Agent 5
agentRuns.reportSummary: Navigation is inconsistent and unreliable: several prominent buttons (Home, Newsletter, Swap →) produced no visible change, while a similar link (Monitor →) took over 4 seconds to respond. Mixed use of buttons vs links for anchor navigation hurts clarity and predictability. Multiple network errors and a serious color‑contrast violation undermine trust and accessibility. Conversion paths like the newsletter were not verifiably reachable during this run.

reportSummary: 5 of 5 agent perspectives completed for https://ramphub.io/. The average overall score was 3/10.
